MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration And To Appoint Judge Lynch As Neutral Arbitrator IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189 =301/PJB
